results.title: Preds give new forward Bourque 6-year, $33M deal
results.description: The Nashville Predators signed center Mavrik Bourque, 24, to a six-year, $33 million contract Saturday, three days after acquiring the restricted free agent from the Dallas Stars following a season in which he posted 20 goals and 21 assists in 82 games.

results.title: France survive Paraguay's prickly test but warning lights flash
results.description: PHILADELPHIA, July 4 : France arrived in Philadelphia with the swagger of World Cup heavyweights and left looking like they had spent the afternoon wrestling a cactus, grinding out a narrow victory over Paraguay in sweltering conditions.Their win was less a showcase of French elegance than a survival exercise
